products.description: Ordinary Portland Cement 53 Grade, 50kg bag. High strength cement for RCC, plastering and masonry work.

products.description: Fe-500 grade TMT steel reinforcement bars, 12mm diameter. Used for RCC structures and slabs.

products.description: Standard red clay bricks, size 230x110x75mm. First class quality for load-bearing and partition walls.

products.description: Clean river sand, zone II, free from clay and organic matter. Used for plastering and masonry mortar.

products.name: Crushed Stone Aggregate 20mm
products.description: 20mm crushed granite stone aggregate for concrete mixing. Conforms to IS 383 specifications.

products.description: Portland Pozzolana Cement, 50kg bag. Better workability and durability for general construction.

products.name: MS Pipes 1 inch
products.description: Mild steel ERW pipes, 1 inch nominal bore, 3.2mm wall thickness. Used for water supply and structural applications.

products.name: Electrical Wire 2.5mm
products.description: FR PVC insulated copper wire, 2.5mm cross section, 1100V grade. Used for house wiring circuits.

products.name: Ceramic Floor Tiles 2x2
products.description: 600x600mm ceramic vitrified floor tiles, anti-skid finish. Suitable for residential and commercial flooring.

products.name: White Cement
products.description: White Portland cement for decorative finishes, tile grouting and surface repair work.

products.name: Paint - Wall Primer
products.description: Acrylic wall primer for interior and exterior surfaces. Provides excellent adhesion and reduces paint consumption.

products.name: GI Binding Wire
products.description: Galvanized iron binding wire, 16-18 gauge. Used for tying steel reinforcement bars in RCC work.

products.name: Hollow Concrete Blocks
products.description: 400x200x200mm hollow concrete blocks. Lightweight alternative to bricks for partition and boundary walls.

products.name: PVC Conduit Pipe 25mm
